title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Andhra Pradesh and Madras (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1959. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st April, 1960, vide Notification No. S.O. 2863, dated 29th December, 1959, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
